name: obsidian-wiki
description: Maintain an Obsidian LLM-Wiki + AI-Enterprise-Delivery-System knowledge: deterministic structure layer (Home tree / per-dir READMEs / partition pages), spec-distill v2 (writes yml knowledge to <project_root>/.ai-memory/knowledge/{rules,business,modules,cases,pitfalls}/ — discards all .md outputs), content curation (lint/ingest/curate), and a unified orchestrator. Generic code + per-vault .wiki/config.json, zero hardcoded structure.
